title: Craftable Armor Trims
description: Allows you to craft armor trims!
body:
This pack adds craftable armor trims, while still having it somewhat balanced by requiring a diamond block. The trim duplication recipes still function as normal as well.




RECIPES ARE THE IN THIS VIDEO: youtu.be/zt7iBZH_iL4



How Do I Enable This For A Singleplayer World?

-For a single player world, all you have to do is when making your world go to:

MORE > DATAPACKS > OPEN PACK FOLDER > then just drag the Craftable Trims datapack in and enable it. It's that simple!



How Do I Enable This For My Server?

-For a server it is a little different and involving you having access to your server files. You need to access the "world" folder, but it can also be called "server" too. Here is how you do it:

Go to your files > open the world/server folder > open the datapacks folder > add the Craftable Trims datapack > save > and you're done!
